title: CVE-2025-66249 - Apache Livy Path Traversal Vulnerability

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2025-66249 - Apache Livy Path Traversal Vulnerability
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/17
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*livy.file.local*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
